mapper.update:
update student
name = #{name},
no = #{no},
gender = #{gender},
phone = #{phone},
id_card = #{idCard},
is_college = #{isCollege},
address = #{address},
graduation_date = #{graduationDate},
degree = #{degree},
violation_count = #{violationCount},
violation_score = #{violationScore},
clazz_id = #{clazzId},
update_time = #{updateTime}
where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from student where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select (case degree when 1 then '初中' when 2 then '高中' when 3 then '大专' when 4 then '本科' when 5 then '硕士' when 6 then '博士' else '其他' end) name, count(*) value from student group by degree order by degree
select c.name clazzList , count(s.id) total from clazz c left join student s on s.clazz_id = c.id group by c.name order by count(s.id) desc
